name: Mindy
description: AI-powered cross-rollup yield optimizer on Initia. Mindy automatically scans yield opportunities across Initia ecosystem rollups, scores them for risk/reward using AI, and auto-rebalances your portfolio via session keys and Interwoven Bridge.
targetUsers: DeFi yield farmers seeking automated, AI-optimized portfolio management across Initia rollups
competitiveAdvantage: AI-powered risk/reward analysis with transparent reasoning
Session keys eliminate repeated wallet approvals
Cross-rollup yield optimization via Interwoven Bridge
Conversational AI interface for portfolio Q&A
demoInstructions:
1. Connect wallet via InterwovenKit
2. Deposit INIT into Mindy Vault
3. Run AI Analysis to see yield scoring
4. Enable Auto-Rebalance (grant session key)
5. Watch AI rebalance without wallet popups
6. Ask Mindy in chat: 'Why did you pick Pool B?'
